rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §38.172 governs concussion applicability for student athletes. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: This subchapter does not apply to a concussion believed to have been sustained by a student while participating in an interscholastic athletic activity described by Section 38.152.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and this concussion statute.
